slots.rod: RIVERTEX Fenix 11'5" (Match Rod, 6.5-17.5 Lb, Mod Fast)

leader_recommendation.why: Titanium protects against Northern Pike teeth if one strikes. However, Crawfish Cut is not listed as bait for any White Moose Lake fish species. The float rig concept is sound but needs a bait change.
leader_recommendation.depth_setting: Set float depth to 10-16 ft. White Moose Lake is deep  -  Burbot and Lake Trout hold near bottom in cold water. Brook Trout at 7-10 ft.

issues: CRITICAL: Crawfish Cut is NOT listed as effective bait for ANY fish at White Moose Lake
Burbot needs Small Cutbait, Crawfish Cut, Medium Cutbait, or Shiners  -  wait, Crawfish Cut (71) IS in Burbot's bait list! Correction: Crawfish Cut DOES target Burbot ($50/lb, 17.9 lb)
However, Crawfish Cut only covers Burbot at this location  -  very narrow coverage
Titanium leader is 7 Lb  -  may be weak for surprise Northern Pike (17 lb) or Lake Trout (52.9 lb) hookups
improvements: Crawfish Cut targets Burbot ($50/lb, up to 17.9 lb)  -  decent match for night fishing
Switch to Spawn Sack for broader coverage  -  targets Lake Trout, Atlantic Salmon, and Splake
Alternatively switch to Shiners  -  covers Burbot, Lake Trout, Northern Pike, Atlantic Salmon, and Splake (5 species!)
WARNING: If a Lake Trout (52.9 lb) or Pike (17 lb) takes this float rig, the 17.5 Lb max line weight will be severely tested
Best used as a passive rod stand rig for Burbot at night  -  Burbot are nocturnal bottom feeders

slots.rod: SpookySpin 8'6" (Spinning Rod, Heavy, 5/7-1 3/4 Oz, 6.6-19.8 Lb, Mod Fast)
issues: Heavy rod is well-matched for White Moose Lake's mid-size predators (Splake, Pike, Burbot, Brook Trout)
6 ft diving crankbait reaches mid-depth where Splake and Brook Trout hold
19.8 Lb max line weight is borderline for Lake Trout (52.9 lb)  -  be cautious if one strikes
Titanium leader essential for Northern Pike protection
improvements: NEW SpookySpin is a great addition  -  Heavy power with Mod Fast action is ideal for crankbait fishing
6 ft crankbait covers excellent mid-depth range for Splake ($70/lb) and Brook Trout ($68/lb)
Crankbaits attract Northern Pike ($77/lb) aggressively  -  expect pike strikes
Good for trolling from the Draco Bass Boat  -  slow troll over deep structure
This is your primary mid-water predator rod  -  actively cast and retrieve near structure

slots.rod: Loki 7'6" SE (Spinning Rod, Heavy, 5/7-2 1/3 Oz, 6-24 Lb, Moderate)
issues: 3 ft crankbait runs shallower than slot 2's 6 ft  -  covers different depth zone, good diversity
Titanium leader .004" is only 7 Lb  -  weakest link if a pike or large Splake hits
24 Lb line weight capacity is good but the 7 Lb titanium leader limits effective strength
improvements: Good complement to slot 2  -  the 3 ft crankbait covers shallower water where Brook Trout and Whitefish feed
Lake Whitefish ($85/lb!) responds to crankbaits  -  this could be your money maker
Consider upgrading titanium leader to .005" (11 Lb) for better pike protection
Switch from crankbait to a Narrow Spoon if targeting Lake Whitefish specifically  -  they prefer spoons and spinners
Use near shore structure and weed edges where Brook Trout and Perch hold

slots.rod: Big Ali 13'10" SE (Feeder Rod, X-Heavy, Casting 3-6 Oz, 6.5-18.5 Lb, Fast)
slots.terminal_tackle: Open Feeder 3 1/2 Oz, Hook #6/0, Simple Bell, Quiver Tip 5 Oz
issues: Mono .014" (16 Lb) will be tested hard by Lake Trout (52.9 lb)  -  long careful fight required
Fluoro Leader .024" (36.9 Lb) is strong but mono mainline is the weak link
Open Feeder 3 1/2 Oz at bottom with Shiners is exactly how you catch Lake Trout and Burbot
improvements: EXCELLENT bottom setup for White Moose Lake  -  Shiners on #6/0 is wiki-recommended for Lake Trout, Northern Pike, and Atlantic Salmon
The feeder with Catfish Destroyer groundbait will attract bottom-feeding Burbot and Lake Trout
Deploy on RodPod Trio at Fisherman's Hut  -  cast to the deepest water available (15-20+ ft)
Simple Bell alerts you to bites  -  essential since Lake Trout bites can be subtle
This is your BEST passive big-fish rod  -  Lake Trout at $45/lb x 52.9 lb = up to $2,400 per trophy!
Night sessions: Burbot become extremely active  -  this feeder rig is perfect for them

slots.rod: Rivertex Zeus 8'10" SE (Spinning Rod, X-Heavy, 3/4-2 1/8 Oz, 18-46 Lb, Mod Fast)
issues: None  -  this is the perfect setup for White Moose Lake's monster Lake Trout
Set drag to ~30 Lb for safety margin on the 41.2 Lb braid
improvements: MONSTER FISH SETUP  -  Zeus + L'Impulsion handles Lake Trout (52.9 lb) at comfortable tension
8 ft diving crankbait reaches the deep water where Lake Trout hold  -  perfect depth match
#4/0 hook matches wiki recommendation for Lake Trout
Thick titanium leader .012" provides excellent bite protection against pike and lake trout teeth
Cast from the Draco Bass Boat over deep structure  -  use sonar to find Lake Trout schools
Slow retrieve with occasional pauses  -  Lake Trout chase prey in cold water but won't sprint
This setup also handles Atlantic Salmon (24.3 lb) and Northern Pike (17.0 lb) with ease
YOUR MVP ROD at White Moose Lake  -  use for all active deep-water fishing

slots.rod: Fenix 14'10" SE (Match Rod, 5-22 Lb, Mod Fast)  -  from home inventory

leader_recommendation.why: Light fluoro leader for panfish in clear, cold mountain lake water. Semolina Balls covers all 3 missing species (Pumpkinseed, White Sucker, Lake Chub) with one bait. The thin .008" line and leader maximize stealth for these small, wary fish.
leader_recommendation.depth_setting: Set float depth to 3-7 ft. Panfish hold near shore in shallower water. At Fisherman's Hut, cast near weed edges and structure at 4-5 ft.

issues: If a Northern Pike (17 lb) or Splake (18.7 lb) strikes, this light setup will break  -  no titanium leader protection
Fenix 14'10" SE is long but has enough line weight capacity (5-22 Lb) to handle surprise mid-size fish
improvements: SPECIES COMPLETION SLOT  -  Semolina Balls covers all 3 missing species in one bait
Pumpkinseed, White Sucker, and Lake Chub are small fish but give valuable first-catch XP bonuses
Deploy on RodPod Trio alongside the Big Ali feeder (slot 4) at Fisherman's Hut
Once you've caught all 3 missing species, consider swapping bait to Bloodworms for Yellow Perch income
Glowing float provides visibility at dawn/dusk when panfish are most active

slots.rod: JigWinner 8'10" SE (Spinning Rod, Light, 1/6-5/8 Oz, 3-13 Lb, Fast)  -  from home inventory
issues: Light rod (3-13 Lb) will struggle with large Splake (18.7 lb)  -  loosen drag if one strikes
Titanium leader adds pike protection  -  essential since Pike share the same water
improvements: LAKE WHITEFISH HUNTER  -  $85/lb is the highest price-per-kg at White Moose Lake
Lake Whitefish (max 10.4 lb = up to $880/fish) responds to Narrow Spoons and Spinners better than crankbaits
Light rod + fluoro .009" + small spoon is the ideal Whitefish presentation  -  they're delicate biters
Also catches Brook Trout ($68/lb) and Splake ($70/lb)  -  excellent multi-species value
Titanium leader .005" protects against pike bite-offs while staying light enough for Whitefish
Cast near shore structure and weed edges from the Draco  -  Whitefish feed at mid-depth (10-16 ft)
Slow, erratic retrieve with pauses  -  Whitefish follow and strike on the pause
THIS IS YOUR MONEY ROD  -  $85/lb Whitefish + $70/lb Splake + $68/lb Brook Trout on every cast

notes: Draco Bass Boat  -  MAJOR upgrade from the Lupus! Bass boat with better sonar and rod holders. Perfect for deep-water Lake Trout trolling.
Use the Draco's sonar to locate deep structure and Lake Trout schools  -  they hold at 20-40+ ft
Luminox Headlamp essential for night Burbot sessions
RodPod Trio  -  deploy at Fisherman's Hut with feeder rod (slot 4) for passive Lake Trout/Burbot
FishStronghold M Plus  -  fill with Lake Whitefish ($85/lb) and Northern Pike ($77/lb) before selling

groundbait.recipe: Catfish Destroyer (87.6%) + BigBeam Spicy Golden (5%) + Oilcake-Pele Golden (7.5%)
notes: Catfish Destroyer base targets bottom fish  -  works for Burbot and Lake Trout at White Moose Lake
BigBeam Spicy aroma adds scent trail that attracts predators in cold water
Consider switching to a Crimson Cold Water base for cold-water species like Lake Trout and Whitefish
The Grand Fish Feeder base would also work well  -  targets 'Medium and Large River Bottom Fish'

boat.license_required: Advanced Alberta License (required for boat + night fishing)

recommendation.features: 24.4 ft aluminium bass boat with sonar, rod holders, and trolling motor. Massive advantage for deep Lake Trout fishing.
recommendation.why: The Draco is perfect for White Moose Lake  -  use sonar to locate deep structure where Lake Trout hold at 20-40+ ft. Troll slot 5 (Zeus + 8 ft crankbait) over deep points while slot 4 (feeder) soaks on the RodPod at Fisherman's Hut.

fishing_tips: White Moose Lake is DEEP  -  Lake Trout hold at 20-40+ ft near bottom structure
Use the Draco's sonar to find drop-offs, underwater humps, and deep weed edges
Troll slot 5 (Zeus + 8 ft crankbait) at slow speed over deep structure for Lake Trout
Slot 2 (SpookySpin + 6 ft crankbait) is your secondary trolling rod for Splake and Pike at mid-depth
Cast slot 3 (Loki + 3 ft crankbait) toward shore structure from the boat for Brook Trout
Set up RodPod Trio at Fisherman's Hut with slot 4 (feeder) before heading out on the boat
Return to shore periodically to check feeder rod and sell keepnet
Night sessions from the boat with headlamp  -  Burbot are extremely active after dark in deep water
boat.cost_analysis: Advanced Alberta License for boat + night: check in-game pricing. Travel $6,800 + $1,000/day extend. Lake Trout ($45/lb x 52.9 lb max = $2,400 per trophy) + Lake Whitefish ($85/lb) + Northern Pike ($77/lb) = high income potential to offset costs.

passive_fishing.stand_spot_why: The only named spot at White Moose Lake. Deploy the RodPod Trio here with the feeder rod cast to deep water. The hut provides a base of operations  -  set rods, then head out on the Draco for active fishing.
passive_fishing.active_fishing_zone: Use the Draco Bass Boat to access deep mid-lake structure. Troll over deep points with slots 2 and 5. Cast slot 3 toward shore structure from the boat. Stay within earshot of your bell on the feeder rod at the hut.
strategy: Deploy RodPod Trio at Fisherman's Hut with slots 1, 4, and 6  -  three passive rods covering predators, bottom fish, and panfish
Slot 4 (Big Ali feeder + Shiners + #6/0): Cast to deepest water (15-20+ ft)  -  Lake Trout and Burbot passive catches
Slot 1 (Fenix float): Switch bait to Shiners  -  targets Lake Trout, Pike, Salmon, Splake passively at 10-16 ft
Slot 6 (Fenix 14'10" + Semolina Balls + #6): Cast to 4-5 ft near weed edges  -  Pumpkinseed, White Sucker, Lake Chub for species completion
Simple Bell on feeder alerts you to bites  -  listen for it from the boat
Head out on Draco with slots 2, 3, 5, and 7  -  four active rods covering all depths
Troll slot 5 (Zeus + 8 ft crankbait) deep for Lake Trout  -  your monster hunter
Troll slot 2 (SpookySpin + 6 ft crankbait) at mid-depth for Splake and Northern Pike
Cast slot 7 (JigWinner + Narrow Spoon) near shore structure for Lake Whitefish ($85/lb!) and Brook Trout
Cast slot 3 (Loki + 3 ft crankbait) toward shallow weed edges for Brook Trout and Perch
Return to Fisherman's Hut every 15-20 min to check stand rods, re-bait, and sell keepnet if full
NIGHT STRATEGY: Focus on Burbot  -  deploy all float/feeder rods at Fisherman's Hut. Burbot feed aggressively after dark.
income_estimate: Lake Trout ($45/lb, max 52.9 lb)  -  up to $2,400 per trophy! Target with Zeus (slot 5) trolling + feeder (slot 4) passive
Lake Whitefish ($85/lb, max 10.4 lb)  -  highest $/lb! Up to $880 per fish. Target with crankbaits near shore.
Northern Pike ($77/lb, max 17.0 lb)  -  up to $1,310 per trophy. Crankbaits from boat.
Splake ($70/lb, max 18.7 lb)  -  up to $1,315 per trophy. Mid-depth crankbait trolling.
Brook Trout ($68/lb, max 8.2 lb)  -  up to $557 per trophy. Shallow crankbait casting.
Burbot ($50/lb, max 17.9 lb)  -  up to $891 per trophy. Night feeder sessions.
Passive feeder income: $500-$1,500/hr depending on what bites (Lake Trout = jackpot)
Active trolling income: $1,000-$3,000/hr with Zeus targeting Lake Trout and large predators
Combined: $1,500-$4,500 per in-game hour  -  highest income potential of any location so far
WARNING: $6,800 travel + $1,000/day  -  but one trophy Lake Trout pays for the entire trip

missing_setups: All 11 species now covered! Slot 6 (Semolina Balls) handles panfish completion. Slot 7 (Narrow Spoon) targets Lake Whitefish ($85/lb).
xp_optimization: 11 species available  -  ALL now covered with slots 6 and 7 added. Catch each for first-catch XP bonuses.
Unique Lake Trout (52.9 lb!), Lake Whitefish, Splake, Brook Trout, and Burbot give massive first-catch bonuses
Trophy Lake Trout gives ENORMOUS XP  -  the largest freshwater fish you've encountered
Fish Fisherman's Hut thoroughly  -  it's the only spot, so all fish are concentrated here
Night fishing for Burbot gives unique species XP + trophy potential
Use the Draco boat to access mid-lake structure where the biggest Lake Trout hold
income_optimization: Lake Whitefish at $85/lb is the highest $/lb  -  target with crankbaits (slots 2, 3) near shore
Northern Pike at $77/lb (max 17.0 lb)  -  up to $1,310 per trophy. Crankbaits and Shiners.
Splake at $70/lb (max 18.7 lb)  -  up to $1,315 per trophy. Mid-depth trolling.
Brook Trout at $68/lb (max 8.2 lb)  -  solid per-fish income, shallow crankbait casting
Lake Trout at $45/lb but up to 52.9 lb  -  potentially $2,400 per trophy! Trolling with Zeus.
Burbot at $50/lb (max 17.9 lb)  -  night feeder sessions at $891 per trophy
Fill keepnet with Lake Whitefish and Northern Pike for highest $/lb average
One trophy Lake Trout ($2,400) pays for the entire $6,800 travel cost
priority_changes: ADDED: Slot 6 (Fenix 14'10" + Semolina Balls + #6)  -  covers Pumpkinseed, White Sucker, Lake Chub for 11/11 species completion
ADDED: Slot 7 (JigWinner + Narrow Spoon + Titanium)  -  dedicated Lake Whitefish hunter at $85/lb, also catches Brook Trout and Splake
Switch slot 1 bait from Crawfish Cut to Shiners  -  covers Lake Trout, Pike, Salmon, Splake, and Burbot (5 species!)
Upgrade slot 1 and 3 titanium leaders from .004" (7 Lb) to .005" (11 Lb)  -  7 Lb is too weak for pike strike surprises
Switch groundbait from Catfish Destroyer to Crimson Cold Water base  -  better match for cold-water species at White Moose Lake
